title: Vulkan Mac
description: A competitive (PvP) Modpack which replaces OpenGL with Vulkan, while keeping some performance mods and fixes for MacOS.
body: This modpack aims to replace the OpenGL backend with Vulkan, and provide utility and MacOS mods. For more informations about which mods work on Vulkan, visit: https://github.com/xCollateral/VulkanMod/issues/46
